Setlist
Tour:SummaryShowsSongsGuestsMedia
Dave Matthews (Willie: Life & Songs of an American Outlaw)
Bridgestone Arena     Nashville, TN
 
Poster
Setlist
All media for this show (2)
Saturday
Total Song Time
15 minutes and 13 seconds
Avg Song Debut 02.09.2014
Song Spread 
Misc Covers
4  
Cover Songs
1  
Live Collaboration
1  
 
First time Funny How Time Slips Away has been played since 7.25.10 and first time by Dave solo since 11.5.02.

I: Whiskey River (Chris Stapleton), Three Days (Lee Ann Womack), Mammas Don't Let Your Babies Grow Up to Be Cowboys (Margo Price & Bobby Bare), Sister's Coming Home/Down at the Corner Beer Joint (Steve Earle & Margo Price), I Thought About You Lord/Just As I Am/Time of the Preacher/Bandera/Hands on the Wheel (Lukas & Micah Nelson), Milk Cow Blues (Jason Isbell), A Song for You (Nathaniel Rateliff), My Heroes Have Always Been Cowboys (Lyle Lovett), Shotgun Willie (Lyle Lovett & Ray Benson), Angel Flying Too Close to the Ground (Alison Krauss), Blue Eyes Crying in the Rain (Vince Gill), Georgia on My Mind (Jamey Johnson), Somebody Pick Up My Pieces, City of New Orleans* (Susan Tedeschi & Derek Trucks)
II: Bloody Mary Morning, Willie Got There First (The Avett Brothers), Remember Me, I Gotta Get Drunk (Norah Jones & The Little Willies), Willie Got Me Stoned (Jack Johnson), Red Headed Rounder (Sturgill Simpson), Me and Paul (Eric Church), Night Life (John Mellencamp), Funny How Time Slips Away, Crazy* (Dave Matthews), After the Fire Is Gone* (Sheryl Crow), Pancho & Lefty* (Emmylou Harris), Till I Gain Control Again* (Emmylou Harris & Rodney Crowell), Me and Bobby McGee* (Kris Kristofferson & Eric Church), The Harder They Come* (Jimmy Buffett), Always on My Mind* (Chris Stapleton & Derek Trucks), Sing One with Willie*, Good Hearted Woman* (George Strait)
E: On the Road Again*/Will the Circle Be Unbroken?*/I'll Fly Away*, Roll Me Up and Smoke Me When I Die* (entire lineup)
*with Willie Nelson

Most of the songs (including "Crazy") featured the show's house band, the All-Star Band, comprising Don Was, Audley Freed, Tom Bukovac, Paul Franklin, Matt Rollings, Terence Higgins, Mickey Raphael, Amanda Shires, Shannon McNally, Nicki Bluhm, and Melonie Cannon.

Most of this show was broadcast on A&E in 2019 and released on CD and DVD as Willie Nelson: American Outlaw on December 11, 2020.
